title: TitanPRO™ White Resin Folding Chair with Slatted Seat
features: Lightweight design allows for easy setup and storage.
Our wholesale white resin folding chairs with a slatted seat are a perfect fit for almost any application.
Perhaps the most popular wedding chair, they have become the standard for white folding chairs, as they are made to look identical to traditional wood folding chairs.
Same weight and dimensions, but these chairs are stronger than any wood chair and will last through years of tough use.
Maintenance is easy with resin folding chairs.
Dirt and grime wipes clean from the frame and from the slatted seat.
These chairs are strong as well with dual-component resin tested to withstand a static weight of 1000 pounds or more.
When folded and stacked, these chairs feature a nesting mechanism to prevent sliding and make stacking a breeze.
These chairs have been party rental proven to be tough, durable and reliable, easy to transport, and a great investment.
Check out our buyer's guide for 10 reasons to choose resin folding chairs for more info.
